creator: wefa@nxcon.nexgo.lab.arcor.de
text:
patch-ai fails to apply.
	checking patch-ai with lib/headers.c suggests that the 
	fix has already been incorporated in the
	original (though in a slightly different way)

Fix: 

rm files/patch-ai

	It then compiles; I could not test the result, since I now have 
	elm2.5 on the machine
